title: Better ender dargon
description: Make's the ender dragon fight better!
body:
Hello and welcome to the Better Ender Dragon Modpack!

This modpack is designed to transform the Ender Dragon fight into an epic and challenging experience. Whether you’re a seasoned Minecraft player or just looking to spice up your endgame content, this pack has everything you need to make the End dimension more engaging, dynamic, and fun.

What to Expect:

A tougher and more exciting Ender Dragon battle with improved mechanics and surprises.
Mods that enhance performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even with the added features.
A complete overhaul of the End dimension, turning it into a vibrant and enjoyable space to explore beyond the dragon fight.
Having tested it myself, I can confidently say this modpack delivers a thrilling and challenging adventure. It’s a must-try for those who crave a greater challenge in Minecraft!

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>


cloth confic API,
ender dragon fight remarsered,
Enhanced Boss Bars,
Essential mod,
Fabric API,
Fresh animations,
Gamma utils (fulbright),
Soudim,
True ending:ender dragon,
vanilla refresh,
[EMF] entity model features and
[ETF] entity texture features
</details>


Enjoy the adventure,
SG

**WARNING
I have put shaders into the modpack.
Only enable shaders if you have a powerfull enough PC.
otherwise minecraft WILL crash.**
